pages.text: Custom Brews are created through a multi-step brewing process. Ingredients are first put into the $(thing)$(l:brewery:workstations/brewing_cauldron)Brewing Cauldron$() for a certain amount of time. Then, the brew is transferred to a $(thing)$(l:brewery:workstations/distillery_station)Distillery Station$(), and finally into a $(thing)$(l:brewery:workstations/fermentation_barrel)Fermentation Barrel$() for aging. $(thing)Aging$() and $(thing)distillation$() are only required for some brews, with most of them needing only one of the two.
